name: Brisk Walking
benefits: Improves cardiovascular health, lowers blood sugar levels, and boosts mood.
steps: Warm up with a slow walk for 5 minutes.
Increase your pace until you are breathing harder but can still talk in sentences.
Keep your posture upright, shoulders relaxed, and arms swinging naturally.
Cool down with a slow walk for 5 minutes.

name: Surya Namaskar (Sun Salutation)
benefits: Improves flexibility, strengthens the core, and helps regulate endocrine gland activity.
steps: Pranamasana (Prayer Pose) at the front of the mat.
Hastauttanasana (Raised Arms Pose) and stretch backward.
Padahastasana (Hand to Foot Pose) and bend forward from the hips.
Ashwa Sanchalanasana (Equestrian Pose) stretching one leg back.
Dandasana (Plank Pose) holding a straight posture.
Ashtanga Namaskara (Salute with Eight Parts).
Bhujangasana (Cobra Pose) arching back.
Adho Mukha Svanasana (Downward Facing Dog Pose).
Repeat sequence on the other side.

name: Low-Impact Cardio Intervals
benefits: Burns calories quickly, improves insulin sensitivity, and strengthens the heart.
steps: Start with light jogging in place for 3 minutes.
Perform high knees (low impact version) for 1 minute.
Do shadow boxing or punches in place for 1 minute.
Perform low-impact jumping jacks (stepping out to sides) for 1 minute.
Rest for 1 minute and repeat the circuit 3 times.

name: Full-Body Static Stretching
benefits: Relieves muscle tension, prevents injury, and reduces stress levels.
steps: Perform neck rolls in both directions slowly.
Reach your arms overhead and stretch toward the ceiling.
Perform a hamstring stretch by sitting and reaching for your toes.
Stretch your quadriceps by standing and pulling one foot toward your glutes.
Hold each stretch for 20-30 seconds without bouncing.
